items.content_html: HTH, which stands for HeavenToHell, is a dynamically typed, transpiled high-level programming language designed for simplicity, ease of use, and versatility. Inspired by the syntax of AutoHotkey, HTH offers a user-friendly environment for beginners to learn programming and build web apps.

items.content_html: Automate rune farming in ELDEN RING™ with the Sacred Relic Sword using this AutoHotkey script. Designed to help you efficiently farm a large quantity of runes at the "palace approach ledge road" bonfire. Enhance your gaming experience by automating repetitive tasks and focusing more on gameplay.

items.content_html: Collection of AutoHotkey scripts that we've developed and find useful to deploy on some of our or our client's workstations. Some power-user clients find scripts like these immensely useful. All of these are tested and working on Windows 11.
